title: Ilorin, Kwara — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ilorin, Kwara: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ilorin is a city in Kwara with a population of 1,050,000. The capital of Kwara State, known as a major agricultural center and gateway between northern and southern Nigeria.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
